name: Tomato & Herb Salad
recipeIngredient: Non-nutritive sweetener equivalent to 1 tablespoon sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 1 1/2 tomatoes finely.
2. Combine with oregano, sweetener, vinegar, and salt.
3. Slice remaining tomatoes.
4. Place on top of lettuce leaves.
5. Top with vinegar mixture.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 22
